valid: For the period 00:00 (UTC) on Sun 22 Feb 2026 to 00:00 (UTC) on Mon 23 Feb 2026
general_synopsis: High Trafalgar 1030 expected south Biscay 1029 by 1800 on Sunday. New low expected 200 miles west of Bailey 980 by same time
